---
description: 'System table containing information about settings of AzureQueue tables.
  Available from server version `24.10`.'

doc_type: 'reference'
---

## Description {#description}

Contains information about settings of [AzureQueue](../../engines/table-engines/integrations/azure-queue.md) tables.
Available from `24.10` server version.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `database` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Database of the table with AzureQueue engine.
- `table` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Name of the table with AzureQueue engine.
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Setting name.
- `value` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Setting value.
- `type` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Setting type (implementation specific string value).
- `changed` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — 1 if the setting was explicitly defined in the config or explicitly changed.
- `description` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Setting description.
- `alterable` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Shows whether the current user can change the setting via ALTER TABLE MODIFY SETTING: 0 — Current user can't change the setting, 1 — Current user can change the setting.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
